title: OMP (Omega Multiplayer)
description: A project meant to be played with your friends, there is something for everyone to do if you want to fish in Minecraft with a complex system you can, you want to point? go ahead. you want to be a blacksmith? I got you. there is a system for everyone.
body: A project meant to be played with your friends, there is something for everyone to do if you want to fish in Minecraft with a complex system you can, you want to point? go ahead. you want to be a blacksmith? I got you. there is a system for everyone, although this is a heavy weight mod not all pcs can handle it I plan to make a version with less mods that more computers can handle at some point if you cant handle the current version dont worry.
